amenityNames.freeParking: Free parking in front of building

social.whatsappMessage: Hello, I'm interested in booking the Maison Ayaba apartment

home.heroTitle: All the comfort you expect. In Cotonou.
home.heroSubtitle: Entire private apartment — you never share. 3 sizes to choose from, from €60/night.
home.showcaseSubtitle: Everything is yours — living room, kitchen, terrace, bedrooms. Nothing is shared.
home.cardsSubtitle: 3 accommodations, 3 sizes. Each is a private apartment with living room, kitchen and terrace.
home.card2Feature2: Ideal for couples or small families
home.review1Text: Pleasantly surprised by the quality of the accommodation and Olivia's responsiveness. The location makes it even more unique. Cleanliness, setting, everything was perfect.
home.review2Text: A beautiful and welcoming space. Well thought out, comfortable and relaxing. Olivia was kind, responsive and very attentive. Highly recommended!
home.finalCtaSubtitle: Book the entire apartment and start planning your stay

apartment.pageDescription: 3 furnished apartments in Fidjrossè, Cotonou. 122 to 167 m², 1 to 3 bedrooms. Living room, kitchen, terrace. From €60/night.
apartment.sectionSubtitle: 3 sizes, same high standard. Each accommodation is an entire apartment with living room, equipped kitchen, terrace and private bedrooms.
apartment.tourSubtitle: Living room, kitchen, terrace — these spaces are identical in all 3 accommodations. Everything is yours.
apartment.bedroomsSubtitle: Depending on your chosen accommodation, you get 1 to 3 bedrooms with private bathrooms. Each bedroom is exclusively yours.
apartment.howItWorks: Maison Ayaba is a complete apartment that you rent entirely. No other guests stay at the same time.
apartment.floorPlanAlt: Floor plan of Maison Ayaba apartment — one single home with living room, kitchen, terrace and up to 3 bedrooms
apartment.config1chDescription: The entire apartment for you alone or as a couple. Dedicated office, high-speed WiFi and air conditioning — with full access to the living room, equipped kitchen, and terrace.
apartment.config2chDescription: The entire apartment with 2 bedrooms. Perfect for a couple or small family — living room, equipped kitchen and all the comforts for an independent stay in Fidjrossè.
apartment.config3chDescription: The entire apartment with all 3 bedrooms. Our best value for groups and families — up to 6 guests, baby crib available, washing machine and private terrace.
apartment.faq1Q: Do I share the apartment with other guests?
apartment.faq1A: No, never. The apartment is entirely private — no one else stays there during your booking.
apartment.faq2A: Yes, high-speed WiFi with a strong signal throughout the apartment, wherever you are. Even during power outages, WiFi stays on — you can keep working without interruption.
apartment.faq3A: Yes, the transfer from Cotonou airport is complimentary with every booking. Your host arranges everything before your arrival.
apartment.faq4A: You book directly on Airbnb. Select the number of guests on our site, then click Book — you'll be redirected to the matching listing.
apartment.airbnbRedirect: You will be redirected to our Airbnb listing to finalize your booking
apartment.faqPageDescription: All your questions about Maison Ayaba answered: apartment, booking, amenities, transport, safety in Cotonou.
apartment.faqHeroSubtitle: Everything you need to know before booking your stay in Cotonou.
apartment.faq5A: Cotonou experiences occasional outages. During an outage, WiFi stays on thanks to a dedicated inverter — you can keep working. However, lighting and air conditioning will stop until power returns.
apartment.faq6A: Yes. Fidjrossè is a calm residential area, popular with expats and families. The apartment features a smart lock and a safe.
apartment.faq7A: You receive a code for the smart lock — you can arrive at any time. Your host contacts you before arrival to organize details (complimentary airport transfer, welcome basket).
apartment.faq8A: Several options: Zem (moto-taxi, 200-500 FCFA/ride), Gozem (ride-hailing app like Uber, 500-2000 FCFA), or a private driver through your host (25,000 FCFA/day, ~€38). Airport transfer is complimentary.
apartment.faq9A: Yes, high-speed WiFi + wired Ethernet connection for work. Sufficient for streaming, video calls and remote work.
apartment.faq10A: Yes, hot water in all bathrooms.
apartment.faq11A: Yes, the apartment has a washing machine. No dryer needed — Cotonou's climate dries clothes in no time outdoors. Iron and ironing board also available.
apartment.faq12A: There is no private parking, but you can park for free in front of the building.
apartment.faq13A: Yes, long-term stays are welcome. Discounted rates are available — contact your host via WhatsApp for a personalized quote.
apartment.faq14A: Local kitchen right across the street (from 100 FCFA). Within 10 min walk: Kalebasse, Jardin de Canelya, Paul Cuisine (vegan options). The apartment kitchen also lets you prepare your own meals.
apartment.faq15A: Yes, Fidjrossè beach is a 10-minute walk away. Local atmosphere with beach bars. Cautious swimming recommended due to currents.
apartment.finalCtaSubtitle: Select the number of guests and book the entire apartment on Airbnb

neighborhood.pageDescription: Discover the Fidjrossè neighborhood in Cotonou: restaurants, transport (zem, Gozem), beach 10 min away, points of interest. Practical guide for your stay.
neighborhood.heroSubtitle: Your private accommodation in a residential area popular with expats — between beach, restaurants and amenities.
neighborhood.introDesc: Fidjrossè is a calm, safe residential area located by the seaside in Cotonou. Popular with expats and families, it offers a pleasant living environment with all services nearby. Maison Ayaba accommodations are located in Fidjrossè Jacquot, a 10-minute walk from the beach — here's the neighborhood that awaits you.
neighborhood.sectionRestaurantsDesc: From local maquis to more established restaurants, you'll find something for every craving just minutes from your accommodation.
neighborhood.restaurant1Detail: Local dishes (atassi, cassoulet, etc.) right across from the apartment · 100–1,000 FCFA depending on quantity · Cash only · Served immediately
neighborhood.restaurant2Detail: Local dishes · 10 min walk · 5,000–10,000 FCFA · Cash or Mobile Money (MoMo) · ~30 min wait
neighborhood.restaurant3Detail: Grilled meats · 10 min walk · 5,000–10,000 FCFA · Cash or Mobile Money (MoMo) · ~30 min wait
neighborhood.restaurant4Detail: Local dishes and vegan · 10 min walk · 5,000–10,000 FCFA · Cash or Mobile Money (MoMo) · ~30 min wait
neighborhood.restaurant5Detail: International and European · 10 min walk · 5,000–10,000 FCFA · Cash or Mobile Money (MoMo) · ~30 min wait
neighborhood.restaurant6Detail: Local dishes and brunch · 10 min walk · 5,000–10,000 FCFA · Cash or Mobile Money (MoMo) · ~30 min wait
neighborhood.sectionCommercesDesc: Everything you need within reach — supermarkets, pharmacies, local market.
neighborhood.commerce1Detail: 5 min by car · Imported and local products, drinks, hygiene, snacks · Cash or Mobile Money (MoMo) · Open daily
neighborhood.commerce2Detail: 8 min walk · Fruits, vegetables, spices, fresh fish — the local experience · Bargain-friendly prices · Cash only · Busiest in the morning
neighborhood.commerce3Detail: 5 min walk · Common medications, first aid, mosquito repellent · Cash or Mobile Money (MoMo) · Open 7 days a week
neighborhood.commerce4Detail: 5 min walk · Wax fabrics, souvenirs, local handcrafted items · Bargain-friendly prices · Cash only
neighborhood.commerce5Detail: 5 min walk · Fresh bread, pastries, baked goods · 200–1,500 FCFA · Cash only · Open from 6 AM
neighborhood.commerce6Detail: 3 min by car · Fuel, phone top-ups, water and drinks · Cash or Mobile Money (MoMo) · Open 24/7
neighborhood.sectionTransportsDesc: Several reliable and affordable options to move around with peace of mind.
neighborhood.transportZemDesc: The most common mode of transport in Cotonou. You hail them on the street, they're everywhere.
neighborhood.transportZemPrice: 200–500 FCFA per ride in the city (~€0.30–0.80)
neighborhood.transportZemTip: Negotiate the price before getting on. Ask for a helmet — it's mandatory.
neighborhood.transportGozemDesc: Mobile app similar to Uber. In-app payment, fare displayed upfront, safer option.
neighborhood.transportGozemTip: Download the app before you arrive. Also works for deliveries.
neighborhood.transportChauffeurDesc: Arranged through your host. Ideal for excursions or day trips.
neighborhood.transportChauffeurTip: Ask your host — they know trusted drivers.
neighborhood.transportAeroportDesc: Cadjehoun Airport is ~20 minutes from Fidjrossè. Shuttle or private driver available.
neighborhood.sectionPlageDesc: Fidjrossè beach is one of the neighborhood's main assets — fine sand, local atmosphere.
neighborhood.plage2Detail: Beach frequented by locals — beach bars, coconut vendors, relaxed vibe
neighborhood.plage3Detail: Currents can be strong — swim cautiously. Prefer supervised areas
neighborhood.sectionPointsInteretDesc: Cotonou and its surroundings are full of places to discover — culture, history, nature.
neighborhood.poi2Detail: Historic square in the heart of the city
neighborhood.poi3Detail: The largest market in West Africa — a must-see experience
neighborhood.inlineCta1: These spots are just minutes from our accommodations
neighborhood.inlineCta2: You know how to get around and where to swim — all that's missing is your accommodation
neighborhood.offerSubtitle: 3 private apartments — you never share. Living room, kitchen, terrace, all yours.
neighborhood.finalCtaTitle: Ready to book your private accommodation?
neighborhood.finalCtaSubtitle: 3 accommodations to choose from, for 2 to 6 guests — book in Fidjrossè and start planning your stay in Cotonou.
neighborhood.faqRestaurantsQ: What restaurants are near Maison Ayaba in Fidjrossè?
neighborhood.faqRestaurantsA: Several options nearby: a local kitchen right across the street (Beninese dishes from 100 FCFA, served immediately), and within a 10 min walk: Kalebasse, Jardin de Canelya, Paul Cuisine (vegan options), Le Lieu Unique and Felicita Café Coco (5,000–10,000 FCFA, cash or MoMo).
neighborhood.faqTransportQ: How to get around Cotonou from Fidjrossè?
neighborhood.faqTransportA: Several options: Zem (moto-taxi, 200-500 FCFA/ride), Gozem (ride-hailing app like Uber, 500-2000 FCFA), private driver through your host (15,000-25,000 FCFA/day). Cadjehoun Airport is 20 minutes away.
neighborhood.faqPlageQ: Is the beach close to Maison Ayaba?
neighborhood.faqPlageA: Yes, Fidjrossè beach is about a 10-minute walk from the apartment. It's a beach frequented by locals with beach bars and a relaxed atmosphere. Cautious swimming recommended due to currents.

host.pageDescription: Meet the host of Maison Ayaba in Cotonou and the Kwabo Protocol: anticipatory hospitality, welcome basket. A stay designed for you.
host.heroSubtitle: Behind Maison Ayaba, a host who knows Cotonou and anticipates your every need.
host.name: Guillaume
host.introStory:
Coming from the diaspora, I discovered Cotonou and fell in love with the city's energy. But when looking for quality accommodation, I noticed a gap: comfortable, reliable apartments designed for discerning travelers simply didn't exist.

I decided to create what I wished I had found. Maison Ayaba is an apartment in Fidjrossè — a calm neighborhood, close to the beach, 20 minutes from the airport — equipped so you don't have to worry about a thing: inverter that keeps WiFi running during outages, AC in every room, high-speed WiFi, smart lock.

An on-site team, documented processes. This isn't an improvised Airbnb — it's a structured hospitality brand. And that changes everything for your experience.
host.philosophyDesc: I believe great accommodation isn't just four walls and a bed. It's a place that lets you live normally from day one.
host.value1Desc: From mattress quality to WiFi speed to the type of coffee maker — everything is designed so you don't have to think about it.
host.value2Desc: Yes, there are power outages in Cotonou. The inverter keeps WiFi running so you can work, but lights and AC stop until power returns. I'd rather tell you things as they are.
host.value3Desc: The questions you don't dare ask — airport transfer, neighborhood safety, where to eat — I've already answered them. That's the Kwabo Protocol.
host.kwaboTitle: Drop your bags, we'll handle the rest
host.kwaboSubtitle: "Kwabo" means "welcome" in Fon, the local language. It's also our promise: every stay begins with the little touches that make the difference.
host.kwaboMessageDesc: Before your arrival, we prepare your stay together — airport transfer tips, restaurant recommendations, practical questions. You don't land in the unknown.
host.kwaboClimDesc: Fresh linens, WiFi configured, everything is in place. You arrive to a welcoming, ready-to-live apartment — not a construction site.
host.kwaboPanierDesc: Fresh seasonal fruits, cold drinks, coffee and next morning's breakfast. Everything to start your stay without rushing to the supermarket.
host.kwaboMotDesc: A personalized welcome to start your stay on the right foot — because feeling welcome changes everything.
host.finalCtaSubtitle: Select the number of guests and book with confidence

blog.pageDescription: Practical tips for your stay in Cotonou: safety, transport, accommodation. Everything you need to know before you go.
blog.heroSubtitle: Practical tips and guides to prepare your stay in Cotonou

booking.pageDescription: Book the entire Maison Ayaba apartment in Cotonou. 1, 2 or 3 bedrooms with WiFi, inverter, AC. From €60/night on Airbnb.
booking.heroSubtitle: An entire apartment in Fidjrossè, Cotonou. Select the number of guests and book in a few clicks.
booking.finalCtaSubtitle: Select the number of guests and book with confidence

guest.redirectNote: You will be redirected to our Airbnb listing to complete your booking
guest.privateNote: The apartment is always private, no matter how many guests. No one else stays there — unused bedrooms simply stay locked.
